title: New Song Spotlight
description: This week’s spotlight is Elton John’s "Crocodile Rock" — a bright, retro rock-and-roll throwback with a huge singalong chorus and pure dance-floor nostalgia. Written by Elton John and Bernie Taupin, it came from the Don’t Shoot Me I’m Only the Piano Player era and became Elton’s first No. 1 single in the United States. For a Djembe show, it is the kind of playful, high-energy number that can wake up the room, invite audience smiles, and give everyone an easy hook to remember.
